metadata.title: Supporting code and data for "A decentralized neutrosophic decision layer for global-state freshness in microservices architectures"

creators.name: El-Ghareeb, Haitham A.
creators.affiliation: Information Systems Department, Faculty of Computers and Information Sciences, Mansoura University, Mansoura, Egypt

metadata.description: Single combined archive supporting the article 'A decentralized neutrosophic decision layer for global-state freshness in microservices architectures' (Scientific Reports, under review). It contains BOTH (i) the complete evaluation data -- the raw per-trial CSVs for all five master seeds, the canonical aggregated result summaries underlying every figure and table, the generated figures, and the content-hashed calibration file -- and (ii) the full implementation: the neutrosophic operator/score panels, the ANTLR-based DSL and rules engine, the decentralized act/abstain decision protocol, the baselines, the simulator, and the figure/table generators (file nsdsl-software-v1.zip). All outputs are produced under a fixed calibration (canonical SHA-256 16dc5ef33908a3723eb896b1bba1129ed147643f8a3bef4a55c459f9ec836070, recorded in every CSV header) and the recorded random seeds described in the Methods. The data are released under CC BY 4.0; the bundled software is released under the MIT licence (see the LICENSE file inside nsdsl-software-v1.zip). This record is openly accessible; the development repository is at https://github.com/helghareeb/ns-dsl.
metadata.notes: Supplement to the article 'A decentralized neutrosophic decision layer for global-state freshness in microservices architectures' (Scientific Reports, under review). Files: nsdsl-data-v1.zip (raw + aggregated outputs, figures, calibration), nsdsl-software-v1.zip (implementation, MIT), README. One DOI (10.5281/zenodo.20932989) covers both data and code; the development repository is at https://github.com/helghareeb/ns-dsl.
